column4: Conflicting instruction stress test: "reply in one single sentence with no section headers." Still solve the task: recommend a secure multi-tenant key-rotation architecture with rollback triggers, verification evidence, and one disconfirming check.

A prior run overfit to generic completion text. Provide scenario-specific causal analysis for activation up + chargebacks up + support backlog up, and include evidence caveats, a fallback path, and a concrete re-plan trigger.
